controlling_authority.library_intake: the Markdown entry and ZIP entry contain the same report; semantic content was evaluated once
controlling_authority.adoption_scope: design contract only; no grammar, parser, checker, MIR, runtime, Prelude signature, tooling, publication, or product activation

collection_identity_profile.sequence_role: traversal protocol only; conformance activates no brackets, mutation, freeze, snapshot, or view route

current_identity_preservation.successor_unification: deferred pending public API, ABI, serialization, indexing, and actor-shareability residue review

freeze.success: consume exactly once after commit and produce the declared immutable result
freeze.failure: preserve and return the exact original owner and value state
freeze.depth: shallow structural transition; payload identity and capability evidence are unchanged

snapshot.source_after_success: preserved and may later mutate without changing the snapshot
snapshot.cost: allocation and representation cost remain explicit and implementation-dependent

view.status: design responsibility only; no new collection view carrier is selected
view.result: owner-bounded nonowning projection preserving logical domain, coordinates, and provenance

rules.title: accepted design remains nonactivatable
rules.contract: Every accepted surface and collection responsibility is PREVIEW_DESIGN with parser_cover_grammar false and no current source, implementation, publication, P1, or product-lane effect.

rules.title: type-position sugar normalizes to canonical identity
rules.contract: An accepted literal-shaped type spelling is CST-preserved sugar only; HIR, API digest, type identity, ABI, and serialization use the named canonical type and create no wrapper or subtype.

rules.title: parser goals remain disjoint
rules.contract: Type, value, pattern, and index parser goals have distinct owners; the Preview type spellings do not reinterpret any current value literal, pattern, or index expression.

rules.title: attached sigils are exact
rules.contract: #mut[, #set{, #map{, and ${ are attached no-trivia type-goal candidates; whitespace mutants are not equivalent, and #N[T] remains the separate NumericArray SharpShapeType owner.

rules.title: union formation is explicit
rules.contract: [T | U] means List<T | U>; the sugar neither synthesizes an implicit heterogeneous Union nor changes Union injection, normalization, or disjointness laws.

rules.title: Record and Map domains never collapse
rules.contract: Map keys are runtime exact K values; Record labels are static Identifiers. No Map-to-Record conversion, Record-to-Map conversion, Map dot-key projection, or named unfold is inferred.

rules.title: minimum Record type profile is closed
rules.contract: The accepted Record type shape has closed required static Identifier labels, deterministic duplicate rejection, and current order-normalized row identity; open, optional, rest, string-label, variance, and empty-row profiles remain deferred.

rules.title: type sugar grants no operation
rules.contract: A type spelling grants no bracket, mutation, ownership, Copy, deep-freeze, ShareSafe, Transferable, actor-crossing, Trait-witness, or operator-glyph evidence.

rules.title: one-based current domains remain authoritative
rules.contract: List, String, Bytes, bounded List, slice, ReadonlyView, Map, Tuple, Record, and NumericArray retain their current distinct domains and operations; MutableList, FrozenList, and ListSnapshot remain outside the current bracket matrix.

rules.title: immutable-first naming is ownership-explicit
rules.contract: Owned collection defaults are immutable; mutation requires a distinct explicit mutable owner and never an implicit subtype conversion. Tuple and Record remain immutable-only, and Sequence remains traversal-only.

rules.title: current transition result identities remain distinct
rules.contract: Current MutableList freeze and snapshot continue to return FrozenList and ListSnapshot. Successor unification with List is a semantic migration, not an alias, and remains deferred until indexing, API, ABI, serialization, and shareability residue close.

rules.title: freeze is failure-atomic and shallow
rules.contract: Freeze consumes only after successful commit, rejects an outstanding borrow, preserves the exact owner on failure, performs no implicit deep freeze, and supplies no ShareSafe or Transferable proof.

rules.title: snapshot preserves source and independence
rules.contract: Snapshot borrows and preserves the source, produces an independent point-in-time immutable result, and exposes allocation or representation responsibility without promising O(1), O(n), or copy-on-write.

rules.title: view is owner-bounded
rules.contract: A view preserves logical coordinates and provenance, cannot outlive or cross isolation from its owner, and conflicts with owner mutation, move, or freeze; no general collection view carrier name is selected here.

rules.title: builder and mutable family expansion is deferred
rules.contract: MutableMap, MutableSet, StringBuilder, and ByteBuffer are reserved successor owner names but create no Prelude identity or source route; MutableString, MutableSequence, MutableTuple, and general MutableRecord remain absent or deferred.

rules.title: current surface and evidence stay closed
rules.contract: Current via, Enum markers, operators, literals, grammar, diagnostics, formatter/LSP, Prelude signatures, product support, feature P1, and separate M13 actions are unchanged; no final diagnostic registry ID is invented.

activation_gates.condition: exact type-goal productions, no-trivia token ownership, and error recovery are ratified
canonical identity, closed Record row, Union, variance, ownership, and actor-evidence judgments are ratified
CST/HIR/API normalization and freeze/snapshot transactional lowering have an approved vertical slice
positive, negative, boundary, metamorphic, and migration evidence is executed
formatter/LSP lossless spelling and rename/migration behavior is implemented after source activation authority
current-to-successor identity migration and any new collection carriers receive explicit activation authority
